answer: Standard mutual NDA — termination: Either party may terminate this mutual NDA upon thirty (30) days written notice. Confidentiality obligations survive termination for five (5) years for trade secrets and two (2) years for other confidential information. NDA notice period — employee variant: Employee NDAs in this firm use a fourteen (14) day notice period for termination by the company; employees may resign without notice during probation only.
